runs.reasonSelected: Healthy siblings and target share a workload class, each sibling reaches cohort maturity, and the fan-out-three intervention threshold is reachable.

descriptiveCalibrationAggregate.interpretation: Descriptive calibration incidence only. These runs reused fixed scenarios and changed the sibling-cohort configuration, so they are neither independent samples nor valid pooled estimates of the final v6 policy.
